question: 삼성전자 수익성 분석해줘
code:
r = c.analysis('수익성')
mt = r['marginTrend']['history']
rt = {h['period']: h for h in r['returnTrend']['history']}
print('| 기간 | 매출(조) | 영업이익률 | 순이익률 | ROE | ROA |')
print('| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |')
for h in mt[:8]:
    p = h['period']
    rev = f'{h["revenue"]/1e12:.1f}' if h.get('revenue') else '-'
    om = f'{h["operatingMargin"]:.1f}%' if h.get('operatingMargin') is not None else '-'
    nm = f'{h["netMargin"]:.1f}%' if h.get('netMargin') is not None else '-'
    rh = rt.get(p, {})
    roe = f'{rh["roe"]:.1f}%' if rh.get('roe') is not None else '-'
    roa = f'{rh["roa"]:.1f}%' if rh.get('roa') is not None else '-'
    print(f'| {p} | {rev} | {om} | {nm} | {roe} | {roa} |')

question: 삼성전자 현금흐름 분석해줘
code:
r = c.analysis('현금흐름')
print('| 기간 | OCF(조) | ICF(조) | CAPEX(조) | FCF(조) | 패턴 |')
print('| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |')
for h in r['cashFlowOverview']['history'][:8]:
    ocf = f'{h["ocf"]/1e12:.1f}' if h.get('ocf') else '-'
    icf = f'{h["icf"]/1e12:.1f}' if h.get('icf') else '-'
    capex = f'{h["capex"]/1e12:.1f}' if h.get('capex') else '-'
    fcf = f'{h["fcf"]/1e12:.1f}' if h.get('fcf') else '-'
    pat = h.get('pattern', '-')
    print(f'| {h["period"]} | {ocf} | {icf} | {capex} | {fcf} | {pat} |')

question: 삼성전자 안정성 분석해줘
code:
r = c.analysis('안정성')
print('| 기간 | 부채비율 | 자기자본비율 | 순부채비율 | 차입금(조) |')
print('| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |')
for h in r['leverageTrend']['history'][:8]:
    dr = f'{h["debtRatio"]:.1f}%' if h.get('debtRatio') is not None else '-'
    er = f'{h["equityRatio"]:.1f}%' if h.get('equityRatio') is not None else '-'
    ndr = f'{h["netDebtRatio"]:.1f}%' if h.get('netDebtRatio') is not None else '-'
    tb = f'{h["totalBorrowing"]/1e12:.1f}' if h.get('totalBorrowing') else '-'
    print(f'| {h["period"]} | {dr} | {er} | {ndr} | {tb} |')

question: 현재 경기 사이클은?
배당 많이 주는 안정적인 회사 추천해줘
code:
df = dartlab.scan('capital')
base = df.filter(pl.col('배당여부') == True).filter(pl.col('최근증자') == False).filter(pl.col('모순형') == False)
if '분류' in base.columns:
    base = base.filter(pl.col('분류').is_in(['적극환원', '환원형']))
if '환원점수' in base.columns:
    base = base.sort('환원점수', descending=True)
print(base.head(10))

question: 삼성전자 성장성 분석해줘
code:
r = c.analysis('성장성')
print('| 기간 | 매출YoY | 영업이익YoY | 순이익YoY |')
print('| --- | --- | --- | --- |')
for h in r['growthTrend']['history'][:8]:
    ry = f'{h["revenueYoy"]:.1f}%' if h.get('revenueYoy') is not None else '-'
    oy = f'{h["operatingIncomeYoy"]:.1f}%' if h.get('operatingIncomeYoy') is not None else '-'
    ny = f'{h["netIncomeYoy"]:.1f}%' if h.get('netIncomeYoy') is not None else '-'
    print(f'| {h["period"]} | {ry} | {oy} | {ny} |')

question: 반도체 업종 수익성 비교해줘
code:
codes = dartlab.listing('반도체')
if codes is not None and len(codes) > 0:
    code_list = codes['종목코드'].to_list() if hasattr(codes, 'to_list') else list(codes['종목코드'])
    df = dartlab.scan('profitability')
    semi = df.filter(pl.col('종목코드').is_in(code_list))
    print(semi.sort('영업이익률', descending=True).head(20))
else:
    df = dartlab.scan('profitability')
    print(df.head(10))
